issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill contains verbose explanations and multiple examples.
The skill assumes Linux/macOS and does not support Windows.
Installation steps clone source code without verifying checksums.

scenarios.name: generate-clip-waveform-png
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets the rubric, Response B does not use audiowaveform and misses required flags.

scenarios.name: convert-dat-to-json-and-png
scenarios.rationale: Response B follows the rubric exactly, while Response A does not use audiowaveform and misses the required steps.
